channel.title: International Journal of Nursing Education Scholarship
channel.description: A RSS feed containing the latest articles published in International Journal of Nursing Education Scholarship

item.title: Association between admission criteria to nurse practitioner program in Israel and academic success: a retrospective study analysis
item.description: Article by Marzieh Hasanpour, Fatemeh Bakhshi, Mahboube Shali DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/ijnes-2024-0049

item.title: Lived experiences of international nursing students regarding the studying challenges: a phenomenology study
item.description: Article by Marzieh Hasanpour, Fatemeh Bakhshi, Mahboube Shali DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/ijnes-2024-0038
